gh_a2bf5d8b1ac2ec634b465f35.title: Consider adding a Canada-specific student/product jobs companion resource
gh_a2bf5d8b1ac2ec634b465f35.description:
Hi Jobright team — thanks for maintaining this Product Management internship tracker.

Would you consider adding a small Canada-specific companion resource link for students who use this repo but want more Canadian student/new-grad coverage?

Suggested link:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs – Canadian business, product-adjacent, and student jobs](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/business/) — free daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad board covering business, product-adjacent, analyst, finance, engineering, tech, internships/co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles. Internship-focused page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/
```

Why it seems relevant here:

- this repo already surfaces Canada-relevant product/product-strategy roles such as Toronto/Oakville listings;
- Hanzilla is Canada-specific and aimed at university students/recent grads, so it complements a broader global/Product Management tracker rather than replacing it;
- the board is not CS-only: it includes business, finance, engineering, sciences, tech, internships/co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles.

For trust/context, the project about/verification page is here: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/

No worries if external companion links are out of scope — just wanted to suggest it for Canadian students landing here from search.

gh_a2e4d9bb2f7ed9fc4102fd7e.title: [CUIABÁ] Fullstack/Mobile Flutter/Backend Python - R10 Score
gh_a2e4d9bb2f7ed9fc4102fd7e.description:
## Descrição da vaga

Desenvolvedor Fullstack e/ou Mobile e/ou Backend.
Principais stacks: Flutter, Python, Go, Node, React.

R10 Score é um aplicativo voltado para análises e estatísticas de Futebol, idealizado pelo Bruxo Ronaldinho Gaúcho e o maior tipster do Brasil Lucas Tylty. A Empresa é sediada em Cuiabá, com escritório em São Paulo, pertencente ao Grupo OTG.

## Local

Cuiabá - MT 
Híbrido

## Requisitos

**Obrigatórios:**
- 3 anos de experiência com Flutter
- 3 anos de experiência com Python/Node/Go

**Desejáveis:**
- React

## Contratação

PJ a combinar

Por favor envie um email para juniorabranches@r10score.com com seu CV anexado - enviar no assunto: Vaga R10 Score [Mobile/Back/Fullstack]
